description_long: This is a small, rectangular hostel building with a flat roof and a simple, utilitarian facade. The front features two large windows with white shutters and a single brown entrance door, all set into a light beige wall. A vibrant mural spans the lower half of the front wall, depicting whimsical, colorful scenes and text in Cyrillic script, adding a lively and artistic touch. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or plaster, with some visible weathering and minor damage near the entrance. The side and rear facades are plain and unadorned, lacking windows or decorative elements. The structure sits directly on a paved sidewalk, suggesting an urban street setting.
description: A small, flat-roofed hostel with a beige facade, two shuttered windows, a brown door, and a colorful mural across the front. The sides and back are plain and windowless, emphasizing its urban, utilitarian character.
description_view_0: The front view shows the entrance door, two shuttered windows, and a large, colorful mural with text and illustrations.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, windowless beige wall with a slight protrusion near the front.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a completely featureless beige wall, with no windows or doors.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain, windowless beige wall with a small protrusion near the front.
attribute_signage: A large mural on the lower front facade features Cyrillic text in white and yellow, with colorful illustrations in purple, pink, and blue. The text is hand-painted and integrated into the mural, which spans nearly the entire width of the building below the windows.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is located on the left side of the front facade, consisting of a single brown door with a rectangular shape. The door is set into a slightly recessed frame, with a small overhang above and a step leading up from the sidewalk. The area around the door shows some wear and minor damage.
attribute_window_arrangement: There are two large, rectangular windows on the front facade, symmetrically placed above the mural. Each window has a white shutter and a simple frame, with no visible decorative elements. No windows are present on the sides or rear of the building.
attribute_architectural_style: The building exhibits a utilitarian, contemporary urban style with minimal ornamentation, flat roof, and a focus on function over form. The mural adds an element of street art, but the overall structure is plain and modern.
